chain.thought: Explanation: France has the most first-place finishes with 11 gold medals. Egypt and Tunisia have 0 gold medals, meaning they never placed first.

judge_thought: Explanation: The participant with the most first-place finishes (gold medals) is France with 11 golds. Participants that never placed first are those with 0 gold medals: Egypt (0) and Tunisia (0). Therefore, "france|egypt|tunisia" correctly identifies the most golds and all nations with no golds.
